title: Nouns
description: Learn to identify common, proper, concrete, abstract, and collective nouns.

title: Pronouns
description: Master subject, object, possessive, and reflexive pronouns.

title: Verbs
description: Understand action verbs, linking verbs, and auxiliary verbs.

title: Adjectives
description: Learn descriptive, possessive, and demonstrative adjectives.

title: Adverbs
description: Describe how, when, where, and how often actions happen.

title: Prepositions
description: Use in, on, at, under, and other location and time linkers.

title: Conjunctions
description: Connect words, phrases, and clauses using coordinating, subordinating, and correlative conjunctions.

title: Interjections
description: Express sudden emotion or reaction independently of sentence grammar.

title: Present Simple
description: Talk about habits, daily routines, and general truths.
